failure_reason: Converted the active mic/camera/accelerator learning floor into Form-native android-mesh-learning rows instead of adding a Python carrier. The band now proves aml-active-sample rows for mic RMS, camera luma, and GPU EGL readback summaries, summary-only privacy, active media floor, and native-first speech/vision/multimodal routing at 32767 across Go/Rust/TypeScript/fkwu. The fourth-arm manifest row was lifted to 32767 and PASS-4WAY. The Android carrier compiles with Camera2 luma sampling and OpenGL ES/EGL readback sampling. The authorized SM-S918U1 was visible through adb, but the phone was PIN-locked during live capture, so a live receipt with nonzero active counters remains the next physical proof gap.
